title: Find local movies and showtimes
text: Find movies in my area. Save theater info and showtimes for the dashboard. [template: My Movies]

title: Display ETRADE Portfolio Dashboard
text: Fetch ETRADE portfolio for all accounts with saveAs (e.g. portfolio_IRA.json). Update FILES array in the template with the saved filenames. [template: Portfolio Dashboard]

title: JavaScript Analog Watch Setup
text: Show analog watch, setup time, it should count from now, with JavaScript.[template: Beautiful Watch]

title: Show Weather In My Location
text: Show weather in my location, use [template: Weather]

title: Covered Call Strategy For Tickler
text: I want to sell covered call on {$Ticker}, show me appropriate strikes and delta. low probability less than 0.30. EXPIRY DATE {$CheckIn:date}.

title: Major US and Ukraine News App
text: List major news, in US and in Ukraine. use applet HTML, BIG CLEAN, SIMPLE, DARK MODE

title: Next Week Put Options by Volume
text: Show {$Ticker} PUT options for {$Ticker} shares for next week. Filter out by volume. Use [template: Next Week Options]

title: Next Week Call Options by Volume
text: Show {$Ticker} CALL options for {$Ticker} shares for next week. Filter out by volume. Use [template: Next Week Options]

title: Computer System Dashboard Applet
text: Create system dashboard, hardware , OS, hard disk, peripherals, all GPU's of my computer, show in applet HTML BIG, CLEAN, SIMPLE, Dark mode.

title: Etrade Account Balances Display
text: Show my ETRADE accounts balances, show output as applet HTML, CLEAN, BIG, SIMPLE, DARK MODE.

title: Stock Option Chain Dashboard Template
text: Use HTML applet BIG, CLEAN, SIMPLE look and feel. Generate option chain dashboard for {$Ticker} stock. Period {$Period:daterange}. Use applet template - [template: Option Chain]

title: ETRADE Balance View with HTML Applet
text: Show my ETRADE accounts balances, use HTML applet and best look and feel practices.
